hooks.text: Stop using your bank to send Yuan to China. It doesn't carry Yuan.

hooks.template: Here’s exactly how much (insert action/item) you need to (insert result)
hooks.text: Here's exactly how much you lose to send Yuan through your bank.

hooks.template: Yesterday I was at (insert location) when I noticed something (insert adjective).
hooks.text: A business owner sent Yuan to China. His supplier got US dollars instead.

hooks.template: My customer/client got (insert dream result) without (insert pain point).
hooks.text: WorldFirst users send Yuan straight to China without three hidden conversions.

hooks.template: (insert big brand) didn't want to sponsor this video, let me show you what they're missing out on.
hooks.text: Your bank won't tell you this. So here's what they're hiding on Yuan payments.
